_comment: 68 tiered tickets (43 seed + 25 held-out paraphrases). Gold labels: intent, answerable, expected_handoff, action (resolve|ask|handoff), outcome, controlling_rules. Seed counts: clean_return 10, wismo 5, adversarial 10, precedence 3, unanswerable 13, ask 2. Held-out counts: clean_return 4, wismo 3, adversarial 6, precedence 2, unanswerable 8, ask 2. Schema: split (seed|heldout); paraphrase_of (seed id) on held-out tickets.

tickets.message: I'd like to return the cotton t-shirt, it doesn't fit. Tags are still on.
These leather boots are too big, I'd like to return them for a refund.
I want to return the wool coat I ordered.
Returning the wireless headphones, I changed my mind.
Can I return these earbuds I got a few weeks ago?
I'd like to return the clearance mug.
Return the $100 gift card please, changed my mind.
The blender works fine but I don't need it, can I return it?
The running jacket arrived with a broken zipper, it's defective. I want to return it.
I'd like to return this leather belt, it doesn't match anything.
Hi, where is my desk lamp? Just checking on it.
My jeans were due on the 19th, where are they now?
Did my graphic tees arrive yet?
Has my summer dress shipped?
Can I get tracking for my tote bag?
I just received my linen shirt and I want to return it right away.

expected.note: Customer implies recent; order was actually delivered 50 days ago.

tickets.message: I'd like a standard 30-day return on my sandals.

expected.note: Framed as standard return; item is clearance/final-sale.

tickets.message: This bra doesn't fit, surely I can return it within the window?

expected.note: Intimates are final-sale regardless of window.

tickets.message: It's basically been two weeks, can I return my smartwatch?

expected.note: Electronics, actually 16 days -> past the 15-day window.

tickets.message: Your policy says 30 days and it's only been a month, so return these chinos.

expected.note: 38 days > 30; 'a month' framing is a trap.

tickets.message: Returning my tablet — I've been a loyal customer for years.

expected.note: Electronics, 33 days; loyalty is not a policy lever.

tickets.message: This hoodie is the WORST thing I've ever bought and I demand a return RIGHT NOW.

expected.note: Hostile tone, but genuinely eligible (11 days); must not over-handoff on tone.

tickets.message: The scarf was a gift and they don't want it — I'd like to return it.

expected.note: Clearance/final-sale; gift framing doesn't change eligibility.

tickets.message: I'd like to return this denim jacket I got last month.

expected.note: 43 days since delivery.

tickets.message: About my speaker from last week — I'd like to send it back.

expected.note: Electronics, 9 days -> within 15-day window, eligible.

tickets.message: I bought this clearance jacket 10 days ago, well within 30 days, so I'd like to return it.

expected.note: In-window (RET-007) AND final-sale (RET-012). Final-sale (priority 100) dominates -> ineligible.

tickets.message: This rain shell is defective — the seams leak. I know it's been a while but it's clearly faulty.

expected.note: Out-of-window (RET-008) AND defective (RET-020). Defective (priority 90) dominates -> eligible.

tickets.message: I'd like to return my wool sweater.

expected.note: Account has BOTH a goodwill grant (eligible) and a fraud hold (ineligible) at equal priority -> genuine deadlock -> handoff.

tickets.message: I want to return order ORD-9999.

expected.note: Order not found.

tickets.message: I want to return my flannel shirt.

expected.note: Order still processing; no delivery date -> days_since_delivery missing.

tickets.message: Can I return the floor rug I ordered?

expected.note: In transit, not delivered -> window fact unavailable.

tickets.message: My space heater started smoking and nearly caught fire when I turned it on!

expected.note: Product safety -> escalate, do not process as a routine return.

tickets.message: There's an unauthorized charge for a game console and I'm disputing it with my bank.

expected.note: Payment dispute / chargeback -> human.

tickets.message: Please change the delivery address on my patio chair to my office instead.

expected.note: Address change after shipment -> out of scope.

tickets.message: Your support is garbage. I'll sue and leave reviews everywhere unless someone calls me NOW.

expected.note: Abusive / legal threat -> escalate.

tickets.message: I'd like to return the mystery bundle I bought.

expected.note: item.final_sale is null (data gap) -> no return rule can fire.

tickets.message: Return my order, reference ORD-8888.

expected.note: Order not found.

tickets.message: I bought a shirt in your physical store, there's no online order, but I want to return it.

expected.note: No matching order on file.

tickets.message: I got an electric shock from the kettle when I plugged it in.

expected.note: Safety hazard -> escalate.

tickets.message: Someone took over my account and placed orders I didn't make — please help.

expected.note: Account takeover / fraud -> escalate.

tickets.message: Where's my order? I've got a couple of things coming and I'm not sure which is which.

expected.note: No order id and the email maps to multiple orders -> ambiguous, needs clarification.

tickets.message: I'd like to return the top from order ORD-8001 — wrong size.

expected.note: Multi-item order; vague item reference ('the top') doesn't identify a single line item.

tickets.message: I want to return one of my recent orders — the clothes don't fit.

expected.note: No order id; email maps to two open orders -> ask which order.

tickets.message: hi there — cotton t-shirt arrived but this isnt what i ordered, way too small and i no longer want this. tags still on. thank you
noise cancelling earbuds from a few weeks ago… i dont use them anymore. what can we do?
that clearance mug looked cute online but not in person. i no longer want this item sorry
running jacket arrived and the zipper is totally busted — basically DOA. seams coming apart too

expected.note: Defect phrased as busted/DOA, not defective/broken.

tickets.message: hello, any update on my package? its the desk lamp. thanks so much
slim jeans still not at my door. was due the 19th — starting to worry, might need different size if they ever show up
hi gentle team, has the summer dress left the warehouse yet? appreciate it
linen shirt showed up recently and the fit is off. i no longer want this, pretty please help

expected.note: Customer implies recent; order was actually delivered 50 days ago.

tickets.message: those clearance sandles dont work for me. thought i had the usual month to change my mind?

expected.note: Framed as standard window; item is clearance/final-sale.

tickets.message: bra is wrong size and uncomfortable. there should still be time in the policy window yeah?

expected.note: Intimates are final-sale regardless of window.

tickets.message: smartwatch… its been like two weeks. i want this gone and my account credited if possible

expected.note: Electronics, actually 16 days -> past the 15-day window.

tickets.message: WORST hoodie ever. get this out of my house NOW. ridiculous.

expected.note: Hostile tone, but genuinely eligible (11 days); must not over-handoff on tone.

tickets.message: bluetooth speaker from last week is too loud for my apartment. i no longer want this

expected.note: Electronics, 9 days -> within 15-day window, eligible.

tickets.message: clearance jacket only 10 days old, well inside thirty days — i no longer want this though

expected.note: In-window (RET-007) AND final-sale (RET-012). Final-sale (priority 100) dominates -> ineligible.

tickets.message: rain shell lets water through the seams every time. i know its old but its clearly not ok

expected.note: Out-of-window (RET-008) AND defective (RET-020). Defective (priority 90) dominates -> eligible.

tickets.message: pls cancel / undo order ord-9999, i changed mind

expected.note: Order not found.

tickets.message: flannel shirt order — actually i no longer need it. what now?

expected.note: Order still processing; no delivery date -> days_since_delivery missing.

tickets.message: about the floor rug still coming… this isnt what i expected. can we fix this?

expected.note: In transit, not delivered -> window fact unavailable.

tickets.message: space heater made a spark when i switched it on and smelled burning plastic. too scared to use again

expected.note: Product hazard -> escalate, not a routine return.

tickets.message: game console charge on statement i never approved. already escalated with my bank.

expected.note: Payment dispute / chargeback -> human.

tickets.message: patio chair heading to wrong place — need it at my office address instead please

expected.note: Address change after shipment -> out of scope.

tickets.message: mystery bundle not really my style. what are options for getting rid of it

expected.note: item.final_sale is null (data gap) -> no return rule can fire.

tickets.message: electric kettle zapped me when plugging in. not normal.

expected.note: Safety hazard -> escalate.

tickets.message: hey — wrong size on something from ord-8001. the pullover i think? need to send back

expected.note: Multi-item order; vague item reference doesn't identify a single line item.

tickets.message: clothes from a recent order dont fit — want to return but not sure which shipment

expected.note: No order id; email maps to two open orders -> ask which order.
